planSummary: Re-run after fixing the critical Services bugs (isActive filter, GET /services/:id, search debounce, controlled tabs, validation i18n, delete dialog name).
runSummary: Chrome DevTools MCP re-verification on localhost:5103 after code fixes on 2026-04-17.

cases.text: Navigate to /services. Expect 200 response, breadcrumbs, PageHeader, StatsGrid, FilterBar, DataTable, no console errors.
Type 5 chars 'تنظيف'. Expect 1 request after 300ms settle. Observed: exactly 1 request with full search term.

cases.summary: Status filter 'inactive' sends isActive=false and filters rows
cases.text: Select 'غير نشطة'. Expect 0 rows (0 inactive in seed). Observed: table shows empty state '0 إجمالي الخدمات'.

cases.summary: Edit form — loads existing service via GET /services/:id
cases.text: Navigate to /services/<id>/edit. Expect prefilled form. Observed: 200 response, form prefilled with 'كشف عام' / 'General consultation'.

cases.summary: Create form — tabs are clickable and switch panels
cases.text: Click 'التسعير وأنواع الحجز'. Expect Pricing panel. Observed: tab switches, price/duration inputs visible.

cases.summary: Create form — empty submit shows Arabic validation errors
cases.text: Submit empty. Expect fully Arabic errors. Observed: 'اسم الخدمة بالعربية مطلوب', 'اسم الخدمة بالإنجليزية مطلوب', 'يرجى اختيار الفئة'.

cases.summary: Delete dialog shows service name in description
cases.text: Click delete on 'تنظيف أسنان'. Expect dialog description to include the name. Observed: 'هل أنت متأكد من حذف الخدمة “تنظيف أسنان”؟'.
list_console_messages filtered to error/warn returns empty after navigating list/create/edit.
